description: High-priority subset for limited detector access. Emphasizes intra-ASIC quadrant behavior, column-region ambiguity, and module anchors.

patterns.label: single-asic quadrant TL
patterns.purpose: Check the top-left quadrant marker in isolation.
notes: Most direct probe of the suspected top-half intra-ASIC transform.
Use first if detector time is very limited.

patterns.label: single-asic column region C0
patterns.purpose: Probe the first 48-column region in isolation.
notes: Designed to test whether regions 2/3 alias onto 0/1 in the write path.

patterns.label: all-modules anchor asic0
patterns.purpose: Check coarse placement of the first module anchor in isolation.
notes: Separates module-order issues from intra-ASIC orientation issues.
